TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Carapongay = Gaga mniq Taytung Cangpinsyang ka alang Carapongay. 33 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 82 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 73% niqan 60 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 27% niqan 22 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis62%, Bunun1%, Tayal2%, Puyuma1%, Truku2%. Pusu nniqan alang Ruwan alang Cingsan o niqan tru sslian alang. Nniqan alang Nuysan Pingtung nsgan Santimung alang Cingsan. Gasuc Dgiyaq Cingsan o gaga mniq alang hunac gqiyan hidaw, dhuq dgiyaq Weyryawsan saw hari hunac gqiyan hidaw 8km. Tiri lnglingay Dxgal sttu hari, saw hari 125~150 knjisan. Pgkla patas cyawtung Mgrig rulu: Taypey>Kwotaw tg3>cyworu cyawrywotaw>elug cyworu>elug sanmin>elug wucyuan>elug tungning>elug rwoning>elug cifen>elug cangswo>Ping tg>Elug sngri>elug syi>elug qnpahan nansing>elug cungyang>Ping27> dgiyaq kssiyaw elug>dhuq. Klgan sjiqan nealang Seejiq Paywan. Djiyun kari Kari Paywan ni kari Tlu. Snhiyan cungcyaw Pusu Gaya kndsan dha. Pnaah alang Mnuda kska alang ka yayung Pucyang, ga ssiyaw yayung ka alang, quri saw igi 1-5 rin hiya o tmhangan dha Sekauman ,narac 6rin hiya o tmhangan dha sivalatje ,daya hari o 7rin setaizuazua ,mslagu ni pqita ka lalang, tru alnag hiya sayang o, kingal kmlawa singcng, mntna ni tmhangan dha"Mincusyang", kiya ka kiya ni kari seejiq tnpusu kana. Pgkla patas rmigaw Pusu bi pnhyugan sapah: Nuysan Pingtung nsgan Santimung alang Cingsan mincusyang tg9. Saan qtaan rmigaw nniqan: ‚óéHaysenkung ‚Äß Shuya musa ka Haysenkung Ppanan rulu: Kndadax tunux sngayan rurlu qrngul dhuq nsgan Kawsu alang Kawsu do tucing rulu na basu quri Mawrin, Tacin, Kawsu, mkksa quri alang Samo 90 minute dungan do kika dhuq da. Mgrig su na rulu:kwotaw tg3 haw cangc cyawrywotaw ‚ÜíSngtaw tay24syeyn ‚ÜíSyeyntaw 185siyeyn‚Üí Taywan‚Üí Haysenkung ‚óéQyqaya hnici rudan sbiyaw Paywan yisukwan.
S.PHON: = ¶a…ĺapoŇčaj = gaga mniq tajtuŇč ¶aŇčpinsjaŇč ka alaŇč ¶a…ĺapoŇčaj. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, ** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%, tajal*%, pujuma*%, t…ĺuku*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč …ĺuwan alaŇč ¶iŇčsan o niqan t…ĺu sslian alaŇč. nniqan alaŇč nujsan piŇčtuŇč nsgan santimuŇč alaŇč ¶iŇčsan. gasu ¶ dgijaq ¶iŇčsan o gaga mniq alaŇč ńßuna ¶ gqijan ńßidaw, dńßuq dgijaq w…ô…ĺjawsan saw ńßa…ĺi ńßuna ¶ gqijan ńßidaw *km. ti…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj dxgal sttu ńßa…ĺi, saw ńßa…ĺi ***~*** kn…üisan. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>kwotaw tg*> ¶jwo…ĺu ¶jaw…ĺjwotaw>…ôlug ¶jwo…ĺu>…ôlug sanmin>…ôlug wu ¶juan>…ôlug tuŇčniŇč>…ôlug …ĺwoniŇč>…ôlug ¶i*…ôn>…ôlug ¶aŇčswo>piŇč tg>…ôlug sŇč…ĺi>…ôlug sji>…ôlug qnpańßan nansiŇč>…ôlug ¶uŇčjaŇč>piŇč**> dgijaq kssijaw …ôlug>dńßuq. klgan s…üiqan n…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq pajwan. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi pajwan ni ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč ¶jaw pusu gaja kndsan dńßa. pnaańß alaŇč mnuda kska alaŇč ka jajuŇč pu ¶jaŇč, ga ssijaw jajuŇč ka alaŇč, qu…ĺi saw igi *-* …ĺin ńßija o tmńßaŇčan dńßa s…ôkauman ,na…ĺa ¶ *…ĺin ńßija o tmńßaŇčan dńßa si*alat…ü…ô ,daja ńßa…ĺi o *…ĺin s…ôtai*ua*ua ,mslagu ni pqita ka lalaŇč, t…ĺu alnag ńßija sajaŇč o, kiŇčal kmlawa siŇč ¶Ňč, mntna ni tmńßaŇčan dńßa"min ¶usjaŇč", kija ka kija ni ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu kana. pgkla patas …ĺmigaw pusu bi pnńßjugan sapańß: nujsan piŇčtuŇč nsgan santimuŇč alaŇč ¶iŇčsan min ¶usjaŇč tg*. saan qtaan …ĺmigaw nniqan: *ńßajs…ônkuŇč * sńßuja musa ka ńßajs…ônkuŇč ppanan …ĺulu: kndadax tunux sŇčajan …ĺu…ĺlu q…ĺŇčul dńßuq nsgan kawsu alaŇč kawsu do tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu na basu qu…ĺi maw…ĺin, ta ¶in, kawsu, mkksa qu…ĺi alaŇč samo ** minut…ô duŇčan do kika dńßuq da. mg…ĺig su na …ĺulu:kwotaw tg* ńßaw ¶aŇč ¶ ¶jaw…ĺjwotaw *sŇčtaw taj**sj…ôn *sj…ôntaw ***sij…ôn* tajwan* ńßajs…ônkuŇč *qjqaja ńßni ¶i …ĺudan sbijaw pajwan jisukwan.
S.FORM: = Carapongay = Gaga mniq Taytung Cangpinsyang ka alang Carapongay. 33 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 82 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 73% niqan 60 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 27% niqan 22 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis62%, Bunun1%, Tayal2%, Puyuma1%, Truku2%. Pusu nniqan alang Ruwan alang Cingsan o niqan tru sslian alang. Nniqan alang Nuysan Pingtung nsgan Santimung alang Cingsan. Gasuc Dgiyaq Cingsan o gaga mniq alang hunac gqiyan hidaw, dhuq dgiyaq Weyryawsan saw hari hunac gqiyan hidaw 8km. Tiri lnglingay Dxgal sttu hari, saw hari 125~150 knjisan. Pgkla patas cyawtung Mgrig rulu: Taypey>Kwotaw tg3>cyworu cyawrywotaw>elug cyworu>elug sanmin>elug wucyuan>elug tungning>elug rwoning>elug cifen>elug cangswo>Ping tg>Elug sngri>elug syi>elug qnpahan nansing>elug cungyang>Ping27> dgiyaq kssiyaw elug>dhuq. Klgan sjiqan nealang Seejiq Paywan. Djiyun kari Kari Paywan ni kari Tlu. Snhiyan cungcyaw Pusu Gaya kndsan dha. Pnaah alang Mnuda kska alang ka yayung Pucyang, ga ssiyaw yayung ka alang, quri saw igi 1-5 rin hiya o tmhangan dha Sekauman ,narac 6rin hiya o tmhangan dha sivalatje ,daya hari o 7rin setaizuazua ,mslagu ni pqita ka lalang, tru alnag hiya sayang o, kingal kmlawa singcng, mntna ni tmhangan dha"Mincusyang", kiya ka kiya ni kari seejiq tnpusu kana. Pgkla patas rmigaw Pusu bi pnhyugan sapah: Nuysan Pingtung nsgan Santimung alang Cingsan mincusyang tg9. Saan qtaan rmigaw nniqan: ‚óéHaysenkung ‚Äß Shuya musa ka Haysenkung Ppanan rulu: Kndadax tunux sngayan rurlu qrngul dhuq nsgan Kawsu alang Kawsu do tucing rulu na basu quri Mawrin, Tacin, Kawsu, mkksa quri alang Samo 90 minute dungan do kika dhuq da. Mgrig su na rulu:kwotaw tg3 haw cangc cyawrywotaw ‚ÜíSngtaw tay24syeyn ‚ÜíSyeyntaw 185siyeyn‚Üí Taywan‚Üí Haysenkung ‚óéQyqaya hnici rudan sbiyaw Paywan yisukwan.
S.PHON: = ¶a…ĺapoŇčaj = gaga mniq tajtuŇč ¶aŇčpinsjaŇč ka alaŇč ¶a…ĺapoŇčaj. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, ** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%, tajal*%, pujuma*%, t…ĺuku*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč …ĺuwan alaŇč ¶iŇčsan o niqan t…ĺu sslian alaŇč. nniqan alaŇč nujsan piŇčtuŇč nsgan santimuŇč alaŇč ¶iŇčsan. gasu ¶ dgijaq ¶iŇčsan o gaga mniq alaŇč ńßuna ¶ gqijan ńßidaw, dńßuq dgijaq w…ô…ĺjawsan saw ńßa…ĺi ńßuna ¶ gqijan ńßidaw *km. ti…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj dxgal sttu ńßa…ĺi, saw ńßa…ĺi ***~*** kn…üisan. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>kwotaw tg*> ¶jwo…ĺu ¶jaw…ĺjwotaw>…ôlug ¶jwo…ĺu>…ôlug sanmin>…ôlug wu ¶juan>…ôlug tuŇčniŇč>…ôlug …ĺwoniŇč>…ôlug ¶i*…ôn>…ôlug ¶aŇčswo>piŇč tg>…ôlug sŇč…ĺi>…ôlug sji>…ôlug qnpańßan nansiŇč>…ôlug ¶uŇčjaŇč>piŇč**> dgijaq kssijaw …ôlug>dńßuq. klgan s…üiqan n…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq pajwan. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi pajwan ni ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč ¶jaw pusu gaja kndsan dńßa. pnaańß alaŇč mnuda kska alaŇč ka jajuŇč pu ¶jaŇč, ga ssijaw jajuŇč ka alaŇč, qu…ĺi saw igi *-* …ĺin ńßija o tmńßaŇčan dńßa s…ôkauman ,na…ĺa ¶ *…ĺin ńßija o tmńßaŇčan dńßa si*alat…ü…ô ,daja ńßa…ĺi o *…ĺin s…ôtai*ua*ua ,mslagu ni pqita ka lalaŇč, t…ĺu alnag ńßija sajaŇč o, kiŇčal kmlawa siŇč ¶Ňč, mntna ni tmńßaŇčan dńßa"min ¶usjaŇč", kija ka kija ni ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu kana. pgkla patas …ĺmigaw pusu bi pnńßjugan sapańß: nujsan piŇčtuŇč nsgan santimuŇč alaŇč ¶iŇčsan min ¶usjaŇč tg*. saan qtaan …ĺmigaw nniqan: *ńßajs…ônkuŇč * sńßuja musa ka ńßajs…ônkuŇč ppanan …ĺulu: kndadax tunux sŇčajan …ĺu…ĺlu q…ĺŇčul dńßuq nsgan kawsu alaŇč kawsu do tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu na basu qu…ĺi maw…ĺin, ta ¶in, kawsu, mkksa qu…ĺi alaŇč samo ** minut…ô duŇčan do kika dńßuq da. mg…ĺig su na …ĺulu:kwotaw tg* ńßaw ¶aŇč ¶ ¶jaw…ĺjwotaw *sŇčtaw taj**sj…ôn *sj…ôntaw ***sij…ôn* tajwan* ńßajs…ônkuŇč *qjqaja ńßni ¶i …ĺudan sbijaw pajwan jisukwan.
